OpenInterlocks:
Can't do Reset. ./DPAlarmPresent ./ChamberIsOpen ./SMatchConSW1DI ./HeRFCoverOpen
./ChamberPressAboveThreshold ./CustomerGasDetectFail
./GasBoxPressDiffl
./GasBoxDoorOpen
./CoilEnclosureSWOpen ./ForlinePressureAbove750mT
DryPump has alarm. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/Datas/DPAlarmPresenceDI] should be [NoAlarm] (/Control/PMCExports/Datas/DPAlarmPresenceDI==1)
Chamber lid is not close. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/ChamberSW1DI] should be [Close] ((/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/ChamberSW1DI==1)&&(/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/ChamberSW2DI==1))
SMatch is not connect. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/Datas/SMatchConSW1DI] should be [Connect] (/Control/PMCExports/Datas/SMatchConSW1DI==1)
HeRFCover is not close. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/Datas/HeRFCoverSWDI] should be [Close] (/Control/PMCExports/Datas/HeRFCoverSWDI==1)
Chamber Pressure is above threshold. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/ChamberPressureSW1DI] should be [LessThreshold] (/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/ChamberPressureSW1DI==1)
Customer Gas Detect is abnormal. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/CustomerGasDetectDI] should be [Normal] (/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/CustomerGasDetectDI==1)
GasBoxPressDiffl is abnormal. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/GasBoxPressDifflSWDI] should be [Normal] (/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/GasBoxPressDifflSWDI==1)
Gasbox Door is not close. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/GasBoxDoorSW1DI] should be [Close] (/Control/PMCExports/InnerDatas/GasBoxDoorSW1DI==1)
CoilEnclosureSWOpen is not close. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/Datas/CoilEnclosureSWDI] should be [Close] (/Control/PMCExports/Datas/CoilEnclosureSWDI==1)
Forline Pressure is above 750mT. The channel [/Control/PMCExports/Datas/ForlinePressure1SWDI] should be [Less750mT] (/Control/PMCExports/Datas/ForlinePressure1SWDI==1)
&SetSimulated;
